hints.text: Plates mostly white with a **red Soyombo hint** on the left
**Mongolian Cyrillic** with **Ө Ү** (not in Russian) + frequent **double vowels** (аа, өө, ээ); Latin & traditional Mongolian script occasionally

shared_with.diff: **Ө Ү** or double vowels → Mongolia, plus the pickup camera & steppe.

shared_with.note: Kyrgyz has Ө Ү (and Ң) too.
shared_with.diff: Ң or winter Gen3 silver car → Kyrgyzstan; double vowels → Mongolia.

shared_with.note: Kazakh has Ө Ү (and more extras).
shared_with.diff: **Ә Қ Ғ Ұ І** → Kazakhstan; white KZ pickup vs Mongolian truck w/ tent.

hints.text: All coverage driven with a **large pickup truck** — often visible, with tent, red side mirrors, snorkel or roof racks
hints.uniq_note: Other countries have pickup cameras — but the tent/snorkel/red-mirror truck combos in an empty steppe are unmistakably Mongolia.

hints.text: **Steppe biomes**: empty grasslands/deserts with characteristic **lack of trees**; rugged/rocky/rolling hills, rivers & lakes
White **bowling-pin bollards with two red stripes** near the top
Russian-influenced infra: wooden poles w/ stone support blocks, white lamp posts, 3-stripe ped signs; **ЗОГС stop sign** is unique; each town has its own lamp-post design
hints.uniq_note: The ЗОГС stop sign exists nowhere else; the rest of the infrastructure is shared post-Soviet style (Russia etc.) — use the stop sign or the camera truck to confirm.

hints.text: Neighbourhoods separated by **dirt alleys + wooden fences**; white round **yurts** everywhere; large **animal herds** (horses/yaks/camels…); **ovoos** (decorated stone piles/shrines)
**Coverage very limited** — highways + big towns, densest around Ulaanbaatar (lots of hidden coverage exists); driving direction is usually **away from Ulaanbaatar**
**Topography**: flat east & south · rolling hills north · big mountains/rocky hills west
bullets: Forests (larch/pine/birch) in grassy fields → north
Dirt tracks in flat vast grass → far east
Off-road desert → south/east of Mandalgovi
Arid steppe rangeland (coarse soil, patchy grass) → southwest
Dry rugged hills/mountains → far west; lakes & rivers → west
Snow coverage → mostly around Ulaanbaatar

hints.text: **Fall coverage** (orange trees/grass) only Lun↔Hatgal + some Ulaanbaatar; **Bugant forest**: narrow Russian-looking dirt trails w/ close trees + birches (trails not on the map); **crop fields** rare — Selenge & Töv near UB
By far the biggest city (~50% of the population): high-rises, chains, buses, pedestrians, clean roads; suburbs = vast **yurt districts** on hills

bullets: **Choir Highway** (Nalaikh→Zamiin-Uud): longest paved desert road — dry brown, clear skies, flat, **railroad alongside** (west of it N of Sainshand, east S of it); tentless car
**Mandalgovi desert highway**: cloudy skies, darker pavement, **deep blue tent**
**Mandalgovi Highway** S of UB: covered in a **blizzard** — extremely snowy/foggy, deep blue tent, flat
**Millennium Road** W of Lun: late fall, orange short grass, **silver tent**, sun sets toward the west end (continues off-road to Murun)
**Darkhan–Erdenet**: rolling hills, tall transmission towers, crops; mostly winter w/ tentless car, light snow (summer patches east)
**Chinggis–Baruun-Urt**: only paved eastern highway — cloudy, fresh dark pavement, flat
**Road to Khuder** (north): railroad along nearly the whole road (not on map), river south in the west half

hints.text: **Gen3 car metas** (split the country by the truck)
bullets: Roof racks: **rubber inlays = west**, empty racks = east
Spare tire (back right) splits 4 zones: netted / single strap / no strap / no tire
East grasslands: **light-blue tent + forward snorkel**; orange roof-rack strap layout subdivides the east; **red tensioner straps → Chinggis** area
North of UB: blue tent + **backwards snorkel** (+rolling hills/forests)
Tentless car: NW diagonal through UB (on Choir hwy w/ double left mirror + backwards snorkel); always drives AWAY from UB
**Silver tent** → central & northwest
**Grey tent w/ hooks** → west (usually netted spare); hooks angled down → southwest; no hooks left + billowing → Khovd–Ölgii road/Tugrug
**Cage on the roof** (winter, snowy) → near UB; green camo sleeping bag on the cage → west of UB

hints.text: **Gen4 car metas**: UB = silver truck w/ ornate **blue-white roof decal** + snorkel/antenna; east = silver pickup w/ **metal box + shovel** (Bodi Group); west = silver pickup w/ big **light-blue tent** — strap variants: 1 knot = NW, knots both straps = SW, clumped lower strap = central-south (UB→Altai), 4 straps = central-north, open zipper = near Khorgo

bullets: **Erdenet** (2nd city): multistorey buildings, stadium, ferris wheel S; barren hills N+S, cloudy winter, no snow (vs Darkhan), no rubber inlays (vs UB)
**Darkhan** (3rd city): the only big city with **snow coverage** (besides UB suburbs)
**Sukhbaatar & Altanbulag** (Russian border): dry forested hills + heavy overcast (Sukhbaatar fully overcast)
**Murun**: N-S grid, jagged hill north, muddy alleys, dark cloudy (sometimes sunny)
**Hatgal**: lake town on Khuvsgul — fall colours + big lake NE
**Tosontsengel**: red-tinted roads + unique wavy lamp posts
**Tsetserleg**: rocky rugged hills w/ small trees to the N, very clear skies
**Arvaikheer**: warm green grassy Gen4, rolling hills all around, ferris wheel (old coverage: right-side smudge)
**Bayankhongor**: dry; big hill east w/ **Soyombo symbol** (old coverage: right-side smudge)
**Uliastai**: green hills, river through town, Soyombo hill in the centre
**Chinggis**: dry & flat, small hills N, red tent straps (only Dundburd/Bayan-Ovoo share them — unpaved villages)
**Choibalsan**: only major city with **concrete roads**; smoke stack SE, wet-after-rain overcast; odd ped signs (short figure over 3 stripes)
**Baruun-Urt**: towering construction site w/ orange crane ('Smile' POI), dry
**Khalkhgol** (far east): flat green + giant **sword statue**
**Dariganga**: lone hill NW of town
**Sainshand**: biggest desert town; dry ridge splits N/S; mini pink **Eiffel tower** downtown; white lamps
**Zamiin-Uud** (China border): **sailboat lamp posts** w/ golden flower pots + folded-script signs (Choir = blue lamps)
**Mandalgovi**: big desert town, cloudy, deep blue tent
**Dalanzadgad**: **sunset coverage**, fall grass, rocky hills S, loose left tent cover
**Altai**: dark hill ranges S+W, wet roads after rain (old coverage: left-inflated tent)
**Khovd**: dry shrubby, distinct **red-tinted rocky hills** north
**Ölgii**: close dry rocky mountains + red-white **radio tower** in the south
**Ulaangom**: big dark mountains SW + **double lamp posts** w/ blue/green base

hints.text: **Landscape spotlights**: far-west glacier peaks (tallest mountains; car w/ green/black bag over right racks); shrubs+patchy grass E of Uvs lake (Shaazgai similar but hillier); **Khan Khokhii NP** — densest forests, dark soil, grey tent; **Gobi Gurvan Saikhan NP** — bright orange dunes (Jeep follow car in the SW corner); **Yolyn Am valley** — extreme fog + dark soil; **Khoridol Saridag** river valley — rocky cliffs + pebble-covered ground

**Night coverage** in exactly 4 areas: NW of Murun, W of Dashbalbar, S of Baruun-Urt, E of Dariganga — always driving toward town; **rainstorm coverage** E of Khorgo (dark skies, raindrops on camera, sometimes a rainbow)
